StyledText.Data: Media filename: <<Container original filename>> Filename when exported: <<Container exported filename>>
Created by: <<CreatedBy>>. • <<CreationTimestamp>> |. Last modified by: <<ModifiedBy>> • <<Container modified>>
Size: <<FAT Media::Container file size readable>> Width <<FAT Media::Container width>> px. Height: <<FAT Media::Container height>> px.

LayoutObject.name: SVG Web viewer

Calculation.Text: Case ( FAT Media::Container file extension = "svg" ; "data:image/xml+svg," & TextDecode ( FAT Media::Media container ; "utf-8" ) ; "")
FAT Media::Container file extension ≠ "JPG" And FAT Media::Container file extension ≠ "PNG"

Let ( [ isPageItem = Case(FAT Media::Source item type="page-item";1;0); isMediaCrop = FAT Block @ PI Media1::Media 1 Crop Fit Or FAT Block @ PI Media2::Media 2 Crop Fit ] ; Case (isPageItem And isMediaCrop; 0; 1) )
IsEmpty ( FAT Media::Alt text id ) Or $$localisation_code = FAT Media::Localisation code
IsEmpty ( FAT Media::Alt text id ) Or $$localisation_code ≠ FAT Media::Localisation code
"Create an ALT text for this media that will be read by screen readers."
Not IsEmpty ( FAT Media::Alt text id )
FAT Media::Container file extension ≠ "MP3" And FAT Media::Container file extension ≠ "MP4" And FAT Media::Container file extension ≠ "MPG"
FAT Media::Container file extension ≠ "MP3" And FAT Media::Container file extension ≠ "MP4" And FAT Media::Container file extension ≠ "MPG"
FAT Media::Container file extension ≠ "MP3" And FAT Media::Container file extension ≠ "MP4" And FAT Media::Container file extension ≠ "MPG"
"Remove all IOs for this page item"
"Add an IO of type User media to replace this media during runtime"

StyledText.Data: Media IO for user uploaded media

Calculation.Text: "/*ValueCount ( FAT Localisation @ Package::PrimaryKey )=0¶¶or¶¶FAT Media::Localisation code ≠ FAT Title::Original localisation code*/"

StyledText.Data: <<ƒ:Case ( ValueCount ( FAT Media TRANS::PrimaryKey ) > 0 ; "This media has localised versions"; not IsEmpty (FAT Media::Original key) ; "This media is a localised version with localisation code " & Localisation code & "." ; "This media does not have any localised versions." )>>
Add an IO of type User media to replace this media during runtime.
